home.heroDescription: Fix JS floating-point errors with BigInt, plus type-friendly number formatting. Zero runtime dependencies, fully typed.
home.whyDescription: One library covering precision arithmetic, expression evaluation and number formatting.
home.ctaDescription: pnpm add {'@'}wzo/calc and start computing precisely.

precision.title: Precision arithmetic
precision.description: Represented internally with BigInt — 0.1 + 0.2 is exactly 0.3, never loses precision.

formatting.title: Type-friendly formatting
formatting.description: Thousands, percent, compact, fraction, scientific, 4 rounding modes — all via a typed options object.

expression.title: Expression evaluation
expression.description: calc("1 + 2 * 3") with arithmetic, parentheses, math functions (max/min/clamp…) and _fmt formatting.

apiStyles.title: Multiple API styles
apiStyles.description: Chainable chainAdd().sub(), standalone add/addStr, aggregates calcSum — pick what you like.

zeroDeps.title: Zero runtime deps
zeroDeps.description: No decimal.js / mathjs — a single lightweight package that runs in the browser and Node.

typescript.title: Fully typed
typescript.description: Complete types + JSDoc — hover in your editor for signatures and docs.
